title: Mongoose Middleware Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Mongoose pre and post hooks and middleware.

questions.question: What is another name for Mongoose middleware?
What is the primary purpose of pre('save') middleware?
options: To log a query to the console
To perform actions like password hashing before data is saved

questions.question: What function must be called to pass control from a middleware to the next step?
Which of these is a valid type of Mongoose middleware?
What is the difference between document and query middleware?
options: Document middleware is for relational database; Query is for NoSQL
Document middleware is for a single document; Query middleware is for finding/updating multiple docs
Query middleware is for saving data
